to research what integration we could use to save development time
- clarity on what features will be considered for the MVP.
ability to CRUD Students, assign them to the teacher, send them initial form to be completed (that will send emails)
brief info on the student, their lessons

page where the teacher can:
- attach PDFs
- upload videos
- links zoom recordings and transcription? (maybe we can embed it?)
- leave notes
- create daily plan for the student
- mark the daily plan activities as completed/incompleted

- see my classes scheduled
- ability to cancel if needed
- log time per lesson? (maybe to have a different page for it)

- see my classes scheduled
- ability to cancel/reschedule if needed
- ability to schedule a lesson (liked the toptal design)
- log time per lesson? (maybe to have a different page for it)

page where the student can view lesson details:
- attached PDFs
- uploaded videos
- links zoom recordings and transcription? (maybe we can embed it?)
- teacher' notes
- daily plan till the next lesson

- basic info such as name, email etc
- available 'hours' (what they purchased)
- invoices
analytics based on the daily plans (what is the success rate?)
requirements for the developers (user flow with conditions, task with acceptance criteria etc)
